name: Fitdog Lobby Whiteboard Light Beach Theme

fonts.headline: Montserrat ExtraBold or League Spartan Bold
fonts.ui: Avenir Next / Inter / Nunito Sans Semibold

notes: Use the provided exact dog logo PNG as the source of truth for the top-left corner mark.
Maintain a very light cream background with teal/orange/navy Fitdog accents.
Keep social media moments, class schedule, and dog checkout panel visible at all times.
